Description: Wide view of the Eiffel Tower glowing at sunset above central Paris. I chose this because I’ve always wanted to see Paris from above and experience its classic city atmosphere.
Turquoise Moraine Lake surrounded by sharp snow-capped peaks in Banff National Park. I chose it because I’d love to hike here and see this dramatic alpine scenery in person.
New York City skyline at sunset with One World Trade Center reflecting the light. I chose it because I want to feel the energy of NYC and see this view from the water.
Sydney Opera House lit up at dusk with the harbor and city lights around it. I chose it because I’d love to walk along the waterfront and maybe see a performance there.
The carved sandstone facade of the Treasury in Petra, framed by high canyon walls. I chose it because the ancient rock architecture looks like stepping straight into history.
Bright green aurora borealis stretching over stone arches in an open Icelandic landscape. I chose it because seeing the northern lights in person is one of my biggest travel dreams.
Mitre Peak rising steeply over the deep blue water of Milford Sound in New Zealand. I chose it because the cliffs and quiet fjord look like a dramatic place to explore by boat.
Steep green and rocky cliffs rising from the still water of Milford Sound in New Zealand. I chose it because the fjord looks remote and dramatic, like a hidden world of mountains and sea.
Rolling green hills and cliffs of the Drakensberg mountains in South Africa’s Royal Natal National Park. I chose it because the valleys and peaks look perfect for long nature hikes.
Snow-covered spruce and aspen trees in a quiet winter forest in Denali National Park, Alaska. I chose this image because it shows the deep snowy forest wilderness I dream of exploring in Alaska.
